description_long: This object consists of three irregularly shaped stones, each with a rough, weathered surface and a predominantly pale, chalky coloration. The stones are closely grouped together, with visible crevices and natural indentations, suggesting they have been exposed to the elements for some time. Their surfaces display a mix of off-white, light gray, and subtle earthy tones, with occasional patches of discoloration and minor surface pitting. The stones are rounded yet angular in places, with no sharp edges, and their texture appears coarse and granular. Small flecks of darker material and faint traces of moss or lichen are visible in some areas, adding to the sense of age and natural wear. The overall form is compact and solid, making the group suitable as a low barrier or obstacle in an urban park or along a landscaped path.
description: A cluster of three weathered, pale stones with rough, irregular surfaces and subtle earthy discolorations. The stones are closely grouped, showing natural wear and granular texture.
description_view_0: Two main stones are visible, with the left stone showing a broad, uneven face and the right stone partially obscured behind it.
description_view_1: The view highlights the rough, pitted surface of the central stone, with the third stone mostly hidden behind.
description_view_2: All three stones are visible, tightly grouped together, showing their rounded tops and the most surface area.
description_view_3: The stones appear more compact from this angle, with the rightmost stone showing more surface detail and subtle color variations.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or grouped with other stones on the ground
attribute_pattern: Irregular mottling and pitting with subtle patches of discoloration; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with minor surface erosion and faint traces of lichen, indicating prolonged exposure to weather.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or other landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by grass or low vegetation.
